Membership

Join the Society.

A quarterly subscription that connects you to the seed library, the printed Almanac, and a community of people who share your particular preoccupations.

📮

The Almanac, printed and posted quarterly

🌱

Seed packets from the library each season

🌿

Access to the Greenhouse — our members' forum

✦

Discounts across the seed library and shop

Choose your membership

Quarterly

Correspondent

The essential membership — everything you need to begin.

$45.00/ quarter
  • ✦The Almanac (printed quarterly, 80+ pages)
  • ✦3 seed packets from the current season's selection
  • ✦Access to the Greenhouse — our member forum
  • ✦10% discount in the seed library and shop
  • ✦Early access to limited variety releases
Most Popular

Quarterly

Cultivator

For the serious grower who wants the full experience.

$75.00/ quarter
  • ✦The Almanac (printed quarterly, 80+ pages)
  • ✦6 seed packets — including exclusive Cultivator varieties
  • ✦Full pressed-flower kit with seasonal botanicals
  • ✦Access to the Greenhouse with Cultivator forum
  • ✦15% discount in the seed library and shop
  • ✦Priority access to limited variety releases
  • ✦Invitation to our annual harvest gathering

Annual

Patron

The founding-member tier. For those who want to go deeper.

$240.00/ year
  • ✦Everything in Cultivator, quarterly
  • ✦Handwritten note from Estelle or Oliver with each box
  • ✦Access to our private seed library — varieties not otherwise available
  • ✦Invitation to our annual spring seed swap at the farm
  • ✦Your name in the Almanac's patron list each year
  • ✦20% discount in the seed library and shop
  • ✦One personal growing consultation per year (by phone or letter)

All memberships renew automatically. Cancel or pause at any time.

What arrives at your door

A considered object, four times a year.

The Cultivator Box

Summer 2025

Seasonal contents vary

A Cultivator box contains, typically:

✦

The Almanac

84 pages, current issue, printed on 70lb uncoated stock

✦

Six seed packets

Including at least two Cultivator-exclusive varieties not in the public library

✦

The pressed-flower kit

Seasonal addition — materials for pressing and mounting

✦

A grower's card

Notes on each seed variety from Estelle, specific to the season

✦

The Greenhouse invitation

If you're a new member — your private member forum access

From the membership

“The Almanac is the only thing I read the day it arrives. I read it with coffee and I read it slowly.”

Philippa Rowe

Dorset, Vermont · Member since Spring 2021

“We grow things here that we don't know the names of. We just call them 'the ones from the Marigold Society' and people always want to know more.”

James & Tomoko Holt

Middlebury, Vermont · Member since Autumn 2021

“There are things in the seed library I cannot find anywhere else. That matters.”

Rosalind Church

Montpelier, Vermont · Member since Winter 2022

Common questions
When does my box ship?+

Boxes ship in the first week of March, June, September, and December — aligned with the seasons. Your first box ships in the next scheduled quarter after you join.

Can I choose my seeds?+

Correspondent members receive our standard seasonal selection. Cultivator members receive a slightly different selection each quarter, weighted toward more unusual and exclusive varieties. Neither tier allows individual selection — the curation is part of the experience.

What if I don't have a garden?+

Many members begin with the Correspondent membership specifically to start a garden. The Almanac includes growing guidance for every seed in your box. We also have balcony and container growing guides in the Greenhouse.

How do I access the Greenhouse?+

You'll receive an invitation email with your first box. The Greenhouse is a private member forum — not a social network. It's a place for conversations about growing, pressing, and the matters covered in The Almanac.

Can I pause or cancel?+

Yes. You can pause for one quarter (boxes skip but membership remains active) or cancel at any time. We don't believe in making it difficult to leave.

Start with the Correspondent.

Three seed packets, The Almanac, the Greenhouse. Everything you need to begin. You can upgrade at any time.

Join as Correspondent — $45.00/quarter
The Marigold Society

A Vermont seed library, pressed-flower atelier, and quarterly journal for those who believe the old ways are worth preserving.
